title: Stall Detected
description: Emitted when the FSM stall detector observes `window` consecutive iterations with an identical (state, exit_code, verdict) triple. Either terminates the run (action="abort") or routes to a recovery state (action="route:<state>"). See FEAT-1637.

exit_code.description: Action exit code observed in the repeating triple

verdict.description: Evaluator verdict observed in the repeating triple

consecutive.description: Number of consecutive identical triples that fired the detector
